2026-05-26ESDCPoverty Reduction ActReappointment of a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on PovertyReappointment of Avril Rose Colenutt of Calgary, Alberta, as a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on Poverty, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective October 1, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on Poverty
precis: Reappointment of Avril Rose Colenutt of Calgary, Alberta, as a part-time member of the National Advisory Council on Poverty, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years, effective October 1, 2026.
